description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric, featuring a clean and minimalist design. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, forming a continuous, boxy frame around the seating area. Two loose, square accent pillows in a contrasting yellow-green color are placed at each end, adding a pop of color and comfort. The seat consists of two large, plush cushions that span the length of the chaise, providing ample seating space. The exterior surfaces are smooth and unadorned, with subtle seam lines visible along the edges. The base of the chaise is not visibly elevated, suggesting short or recessed legs that are not prominent from any angle.
description: A modern, boxy beige chaise with a continuous back and armrests, accented by two yellow-green pillows and plush seat cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the chaise, both armrests, the continuous backrest, and two yellow-green accent pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of the pillows along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backrest and the tops of the accent pillows peeking over the edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and the alignment of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, continuous, and of medium height, matching the height of the armrests. It features a smooth, unadorned surface with subtle seam lines and no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, forming a boxy, rectangular frame that is flush with the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are not visible, suggesting either a recessed base or very short, hidden legs, likely constructed from wood or metal for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, loose seat cushions spanning the length of the chaise and two smaller, square accent pillows placed at each end, providing both comfort and visual contrast.
